requirements: leads_to(tree, executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service'), activity_sends(tree, 'send email notification', 'emailNotification'))
leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')
executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
not (executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') == executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness'))
leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'approve request') or leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'reject request')
max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close offer', '7 working days')
data_leads_to_absence(tree, "loanAmount > 1000000 and (not executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'clerk supervisor'))", 'check credit worthiness')
condition_directly_follows(tree, "loanAmount > 1000000 and supervisorCheckPerformed == false", 'create suspense file')
